# smejj.com

smejj.com is a free-safe AI and code assistant platform shell.

Core rules:
- GitHub.com is Free-plan-only source code and documentation.
- GitHub Pages serves the public PWA shell and static assets; Spaceship.com provides domain and DNS.
- IDrive e2 / S3-compatible storage is the primary store for files, media, models, backups, deployment artifacts, and central data.
- Paid or trial-based platform services are not core architecture; Cloudflare is not used.
- If AI inference is unavailable or paid-risk, the app must fail closed.

Useful endpoints:
- https://smejj.com/api/health
- https://smejj.com/api/storage/status
